description: Packaging specifications for Yash Poly Plast products. One entry per product. Defines carton config, pallet layout, marking requirements, and special handling. Used by Packing & Despatch (PR010) and for customer packaging approval.

packaging_specs.inner_packing_note: e.g. Polybag lined, individual shrink wrap, no inner packing
packaging_specs.carton_qty_note: Units per carton — e.g. 4 or 6 for 5L cans
packaging_specs.carton_weight_note: Gross weight including product and packing material
packaging_specs.special_handling_note: e.g. This side up, keep dry, do not stack more than X layers

packaging_specs.inner_packing_note: e.g. Polybag lined, individual shrink wrap, no inner packing
packaging_specs.carton_qty_note: Units per carton — e.g. 12 or 24 for 1L bottles
packaging_specs.carton_weight_note: Gross weight including product and packing material
packaging_specs.special_handling_note: e.g. This side up, keep dry, do not stack more than X layers

packaging_specs.inner_packing_note: e.g. Polybag lined, tray pack, no inner packing
packaging_specs.carton_qty_note: Units per carton — e.g. 48 or 72 for 200ml bottles
packaging_specs.carton_weight_note: Gross weight including product and packing material
packaging_specs.special_handling_note: e.g. This side up, keep dry, fragile — do not crush

packaging_specs.inner_packing_note: e.g. Polybag lined, tray pack, no inner packing
packaging_specs.carton_qty_note: Units per carton — e.g. 96 or 120 for 100ml bottles
packaging_specs.carton_weight_note: Gross weight including product and packing material
packaging_specs.special_handling_note: e.g. This side up, keep dry, fragile — do not crush
